title: Bridge Essay: An Overview of One Health Concept Focusing on Toxoplasmosis.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**An Overview of One Health Concept Focusing on Toxoplasmosis.** — Turkiye Parazitol Derg. PMID: 38149449. DOI: 10.4274/tpd.galenos.2023.38039. The "One Health" concept is auniversal approach to sustainably balancing and optimizing the health of humans, animals, and ecosystems. This approach is based on the health of humans, domestic and wild animals, and plants in awider environment in which self-renewable ecosystems exist, with essential characteristics of integration, unifying and holistic perspective. Toxoplasmosis, one of the most common zoonotic infections in both terrestrial and oceanic ecosystems in the world, is an ideal mode...
